events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求评估热工作是否合规。场景：制造或装配车间，标准工作，有质量检验门。工作范围：热工作。检查阶段：rough-complete（已安装或组装，但尚未封闭）。现场条件：permit scope exceeded（许可范围超出）。参考材料：NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J。

热工作许可是关键。NFPA 51B 是关于焊接、切割和其他热作业的防火标准。OSHA 1926 Subpart J 是关于焊接和切割。许可范围超出意味着实际作业超出了事先批准的热工作许可证所限定的范围。这通常是不合规的，因为许可证规定了安全措施、区域、时间等。超出范围可能导致未评估的风险，不符合代码要求。

因此，决策应为“fail”。风险可能为“high”或“critical”，因为热工作超出许可可能引发火灾或伤害。工作阶段是“rough-complete”。组件条件可能为“non-compliant”。百分比完成可能高，但既然超出许可，整体进度可以估计。不需要数值。发现应包括“permit scope exceeded - work performed outside approved hot work permit boundaries”。行动：立即停止工作，重新评估并获取新许可，检查已做的工作是否安全。理由：NFPA 51B 和 OSHA 要求热工作在许可证规定范围内进行，超出范围使安全工作实践无效。引用：NFPA 51B，章节关于热工作许可；OSHA 1926.352。

需要输出JSON。component_conditions: ["non-compliant"]。findings，actions，rationale，references。

注意：confidence 可以设为高，比如0.9。event_time, rate, sound_source 等不需要，可以不提供或省略。但JSON schema要求这些字段，可以给默认值或null？说明说return exactly one valid JSON object matching the requested answer schema. 提供这些字段。可以设置为0或空字符串。

答案格式：```json
{...}``` 外面不要有markdown，直接输出json。在response中直接给出json对象。

我将构建JSON。work_stage: "rough-complete"。percent_complete: 可以设为90%，但只是估计。value: 0，没有读数。order: []，workable: []，除非有相关，这里不需要。sound_source: ""。

所以：
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Hot work permit scope exceeded - work performed outside approved boundaries"],
  "actions": ["Immediately stop hot work", "Re-evaluate scope and obtain new or amended hot work permit", "Inspect completed work for hazards"],
  "rationale": "Hot work must be conducted within the scope of the permit as required by NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926.352. Permit scope exceeded indicates a failure to control fire hazards, making the work non-compliant.",
  "references": ["NFPA 51B (Hot Work Permits)", "OSHA 1926.352"]
}

检查风险级别：超出热工作许可，可能暴露非预期火源，所以高风险。

就这样。

events.label: response
events.text:
{

  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],

  "findings": ["Hot work permit scope exceeded - work performed outside approved boundaries"],
  "actions": ["Immediately stop hot work", "Re-evaluate scope and obtain new or amended hot work permit", "Inspect completed work for hazards"],
  "rationale": "Hot work must be conducted within the scope of the permit as required by NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926.352. Permit scope exceeded indicates a failure to control fire hazards, making the work non-compliant.",
  "references": ["NFPA 51B (Hot Work Permits)", "OSHA 1926.352"]
}
